products[].occasion: string[] optional on each product — occasion tags matched when shoppers pick Party, Wedding, Casual, or Office after category.
products[].style: string[] optional — silhouette tags: Bodycon, Flowy, A-line (matched after structured Style step; fit[] also used as fallback chips).
products[].fit: string[] optional — cut and construction notes; used for display and style matching fallbacks.
products[].isBestseller: boolean optional — carousel caption shows 🔥 Bestseller when true.
products[].isTrending: boolean optional — carousel caption shows ✨ Trending when true.
products[].rating: number optional — e.g. 1–5; caption shows ⭐ Top rated when value is greater than 4.
products[].wa_product_id: string optional — Meta Commerce product_retailer_id. When set and WA_CATALOG_ID (or WABA catalog lookup) is configured, the bot sends a native WhatsApp product message; otherwise it falls back to image_url.

shipping.notes: International express shipping quoted at checkout. Typical US delivery: 5–10 business days after dispatch. Duties/taxes may apply per destination.

products.name: Midnight Silk Evening Gown
products.description: Floor-length bias-cut silk gown with draped back. Limited seasonal run. Ideal for formal events, prom, and wedding guest dressing.
products.stylist_note: Keywords: Formal, Prom, Wedding guest. Lead with black-tie and gala moments; mention the bias drape for movement and the limited seasonal run for urgency.

products.name: Double-Faced Cashmere Overcoat
products.description: Hand-finished lapels, horn buttons, full lining optional on request.
products.stylist_note: Position as a decade piece for travel and city winters; optional lining is a nice bespoke touch to mention.

products.name: High-Rise Tailored Wool Trousers
products.description: Italian wool, pressed crease, unfinished hem for bespoke length.
products.stylist_note: Highlight Italian wool and the unfinished hem for tailoring; pair mentally with the overcoat for a full look.

products.name: Hand-Stitched Suede Loafer
products.description: Unlined suede, leather sole, made in small batches. Summer-friendly, casual, handmade construction.
products.stylist_note: Keywords: Summer, Casual, Handmade. Unlined suede = soft and travel-friendly; small batches support exclusivity without sounding pushy.

products.name: Structured Italian Wool Blazer
products.description: Single-breasted peak lapel, canvassed chest, horn buttons. Sharp for work travel and evening pairings.
products.stylist_note: Position as the tailored anchor piece; mention canvassing and peak lapel for authority without stiffness.

products.name: Handloom Silk Kurta Set
products.description: Traditional kurta with coordinated dupatta and tailored trousers. Artisan weave, occasion-ready.
products.stylist_note: Keywords: Ethnic, Kurta, Occasion. Lead with craft and ease of full set styling for weddings and celebrations.

products.name: Relaxed Resort Linen Shirt
products.description: Breathable European linen, camp collar, mother-of-pearl buttons. Casual everyday and warm-climate travel.
products.stylist_note: Keywords: Casual, Everyday, Travel. Unlined linen for ease; pair mentally with tailored trousers or the suede loafer.

products.name: Sculptural Cocktail Dress
products.description: Architectural seaming, midi length, party and formal-ready. Limited drop.
products.stylist_note: Keywords: Party, Formal, Gala. Emphasize silhouette and occasion versatility; scarcity from limited drop.

products.name: Bias-Cut Silk Slip Midi
products.description: Fluid sand-washed silk, adjustable straps, ideal for layering or standalone evening looks.
products.stylist_note: Bias drape reads luxe and easy; mention layering under the wool blazer for transitional dressing.

products.name: Merino Rib Knit Column Dress
products.description: Fine-gauge merino, body-skimming column, four-season knit dress for gallery openings and dinner.
products.stylist_note: Knit dress bridges casual polish and evening; merino reads refined, not loungewear.
